positive_contracts_covered: actual PCM WAV decoding and artifact SHA256, byte, duration, sample-rate, channel, sample-width, and frame-count binding
canonical event taxonomy, subject ownership, purpose, source event, timing, QA rule, and expected video-frame binding
dialogue, ambience, and foley lane support in one strict event manifest

independent runtime and playback-review proof JSON parsing
hard-gate precedence and computed-only promotion decision
strict Draft 2020-12 schemas and transactional output preservation
local validator and PowerShell wrapper prerequisite checks

WAV decode, hash, byte, timing, sample metadata, and AV frame mismatch
event, mix, proof, and mixdown hash or binding drift
missing required lane and missing, duplicate, or extra mixed event IDs
missing or failed hard gates and non-finite QA scores
inline boolean proof spoof, malformed proof JSON, unknown proof keys, and stale mixdown proof
run-id mismatch and AV frame-rate, span, offset, or duration mismatch
